description_long: This is a compact, modern electronic keyboard with a slim rectangular profile and a predominantly white body. The top surface features a series of sliders, rotary knobs, and colored buttons, suggesting it is a music production or mixing device, possibly a MIDI controller or synthesizer. There is a small display screen on the right side, flanked by a grid of small buttons and a speaker grille, indicating digital functionality and onboard sound output. The controls are organized in rows, with each section color-coded for intuitive use. The device appears to be constructed from plastic with some rubberized or silicone elements for the buttons and knobs. Its minimalist design and portable size make it suitable for use in urban environments such as studios, street performances, or educational settings.
description: A slim, white electronic keyboard with sliders, knobs, colored buttons, a display, and a speaker grille, designed for music production or mixing. Its compact, modern design features organized controls and a portable form factor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full row of sliders, rotary knobs, and colored buttons, with the display and speaker grille visible on the right.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlights the depth of the device and the arrangement of controls, with the colored knobs and display more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back row of sliders and buttons, with the display and speaker grille now on the left.
description_view_3: Left-side view emphasizes the length and slimness of the device, with the colored controls and display on the left side.
attribute_key_layout: Custom music production layout (not standard QWERTY or piano)
